objective: Implement a dependency-free bounded parent-before-child metadata-tree arena with deterministic structural and text validation while keeping XML syntax, parsing, serialization, and queries outside the crate.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Route the bounded metadata-tree contract while keeping XML and runtime surfaces closed.
Describe the exact local arena behavior without claiming XML, protocol, discovery, runtime, or ecosystem compatibility.
Review whether parent-before-child bounded arenas expose a reusable contract or validation rule; avoid a repo-specific recipe when existing boundedness guidance is sufficient.
instruction_surfaces.validation: Review the installed skill and run its instruction-surface whitespace check.

non_scope: XML name grammar, namespaces, attributes, escaping, entity handling, parsing, serialization, XPath or other queries, canonicalization, schema validation, or stream-info document assembly.
Discovery, resolution, networking, sockets, inlets, outlets, transport, buffering, queues, threads, clocks, scheduling, recovery, provider selection, FFI, native loading, or language bindings.

Cargo dependencies, Cargo features, unsafe Rust, additional crates, recursive public node ownership, generated protocol material, copied or translated liblsl or rLSL source, and production liblsl integration.

Morphospace adapters, Manifold admission or stream authority, platform lifecycle, Quest or Hostess behavior, device validation, and any XML, wire, runtime, performance, or ecosystem compatibility claim.

acceptance.proof: Construction requires exactly one root at index zero, every later node names an earlier parent, and explicit nonzero maxima bound total nodes, depth, children per node, name text, and optional value text before accepted state is exposed.

Accepted node order, parent indices, absent-versus-empty optional values, names, and values are retained exactly without trimming, normalization, inference, recursive ownership, or XML interpretation.

Focused tests cover empty arena, extra root, forward/self parent, exact and one-past node/depth/child/text bounds, empty name, malformed limits, Unicode scalar counts, optional empty value, and stable indexed error payloads.
The crate remains one unpublished std-only package with no dependencies, features, unsafe code, recursion-owned tree, XML, runtime effects, protocol implementation, or compatibility overclaim.

outputs: Dependency-free bounded metadata-tree arena, node-input, accepted-node, limits, and typed deterministic error APIs.
Positive and damaged tests plus a separate CORE-004 local-results overlay preserving every historical STRM-000 result.
Deterministic CORE-004 validation entrypoint and public status updates that do not claim XML, protocol, discovery, runtime, wire, or ecosystem support.
commit_policy: Commit the accepted metadata-tree arena separately from XML, queries, discovery, protocol, transport, adapters, or provider work.
